start:
Hi! YouTube download bot

Send a YouTube video link and I will download it for you.

Steps:
1. Send the video link
2. Choose quality or format
3. Receive the file

Use /help for help
help:
Bot help:

1. Send a YouTube video link
2. Choose a quality from the menu
3. GitHub Actions downloads the file and sends it to you

/cancel - cancel
cancel: Session cleared. Send the YouTube link again.
language_saved: Your language has been saved. I will process your previous request now.
invalid_youtube_url: Please send a valid YouTube link.
metadata_failed: Could not fetch video information. Please try again.
expired_session: Session expired. Send the YouTube link again.
workflow_failed: Could not start the download. Please try again.
download_started: Downloading... Please wait. The file will be sent soon.
